data.body:
SESSION 'calibration epics' COMPLETE LOG (2026-07-15). USER DIRECTIVES this session: (1) held item 1 (calibration-3 plan-v2 replay) APPROVED; (2) held item 2 (ac_unverifiable floor split) APPROVED after item 1; (3) discovered bugs ba85+c810 worked in parallel; (4) task-decomposition research handoff integrated into epic 6982 with validate-first E-gates; (5) NO A/B testing - eval-gated validation then dogfooding, clearly documented; (6) NO config-flag/overlay gating - validated changes land directly in the packaged review process; (7) worktree updated from origin/main twice on request.

DELIVERED + CLOSED SIGNED: [a] Task 3dc0/relishable-ammonitic-hoverfly (calibration 3): segmented replay run (1016 plan-v2 sidecars/264 tickets/23877 findings; skipped 1052 = 217 different-version + 835 untagged); NO criterion BLOCK-ELIGIBLE (best rev_rr G5 0.565 < 0.6 bar); p90 priority = 0.85 nearly everywhere (floor saturation); adjudication per pre-registered rule -> ONE change: T5e demoted to advisory@0.95 (FP-PRONE: validity 0.391, 59% verifier-drop, p90 0.27), ten keeps (T4 + E2 flagged borderline for cal-4). Floor attribution: 35.5% of plan-v2 blocks floor-driven (807/2271); ac_unverifiable = 48.9% of floor-driven; 100-sample classification 56% underspecified / 37% broken / 7% missing oracle; 52/100 fired at grade=low. Landed as Gerrit change 714 MERGED (calibrate script skipped-remainder counter + criteria_routing T5e + regenerated criteria guide + gate-doc/CLAUDE.md tier prose + 'Calibration 3' section in docs/experiments/plan-review-threshold-calibration.md). [b] Bug ba85/cuddlesome-titanous-seamonkey: plan-review-novelty dispatch arm in eval_solver + FakeRunner tests; live discriminates_novelty run PASSED 18/18; change 712 MERGED; closed signed. [c] Bug c810/spherular-aberrant-hog: fix landed via concurrent duplicate b27d/taxing-quasilegal-incatern (7a0fac8f5); our change 710 ABANDONED deliberately; c810 linked duplicates b27d, ACs verified live, closed signed.

IN FLIGHT AT HANDOFF: Story 7d91/large-sleepful-needlefish (floor split, plan-v3) - implementation COMPLETE, pushed as Gerrit change 718, votes pending; remaining = votes -> submit -> close signed (full state comment on the ticket). Worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar/.claude/worktrees/cyclefix branch floorsplit/7d91.

STRUCTURED + READY (not started): Epic 6982/pastoral-aquatic-viper (task-decomposition R1-R7, promoted idea->open, plan-review PASSED round 2 signed): 12 story children with gate thresholds as ACs and depends_on wiring - E1=e95e (corpora, THE unblocked entry point), E2=d125, E3=def5, E5=5342, E6=a880, R7=b1a4, R6=5dac, R2=b080, R1=59b7, R3=3a27, R4=03a9, R5=ea39. R3/R4/R5 depends_on 7d91 (file overlap). First wave after E1: R7+R6. E4 deliberately dropped (was the A/B experiment). Inconclusive-gate rule + no-flags directive recorded in epic description + INTEGRATION RECORD comment.

DOGFOODING META-EVIDENCE (for calibration 4): epic plan review PASSED round 2 after 1 blocking fix; floor-split story took 4 rounds (1 INDETERMINATE infra re-run + 2 BLOCK rounds of valid seam findings, some carryover-shaped blocking re-fires with terminal-detail variants); a850's sidecar-baseline remediation mode observed working (baseline=sidecar eligible=True on calib-3 ticket round 2, 12 advisories collapsed to 1). Session logs + all evidence live on the tickets.
